summary: Frontend-only testing of Carter's Care platform enhancements. Verified Login page with form validation, 404 page with navigation buttons, React Router v7 future flags, lazy loading, ErrorBoundary component, accessibility features, and mobile responsiveness.

issues: Vite shows @import warnings in logs but fonts are loaded via HTML head - warnings are from stale cache/build. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: React Router v7 future flags (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) correctly configured in BrowserRouter
ErrorBoundary component wraps entire app with proper error handling and fallback UI
Lazy loading implemented for non-critical pages with Suspense and PageSkeleton fallback
Login page has comprehensive form validation with real-time error feedback
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Accessibility features implemented: aria-invalid, aria-describedby, aria-label, autocomplete attributes
Labels properly associated with inputs using 'for' attribute
Mobile responsiveness working correctly - left panel hidden, mobile logo shown
404 page displays attempted path and has working Go Back/Go Home buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: Login page with validation, 404 page with navigation, React Router v7 future flags (no console warnings), lazy loading with Suspense, ErrorBoundary component, data-testid attributes, accessibility improvements, mobile responsiveness. CSS @import warnings in Vite logs are non-blocking as fonts are loaded via HTML head.
